query: SELECT id, screenType, title, CASE WHEN templateOverlay IS NOT NULL AND templateOverlay != '' AND templateOverlay != 'null' THEN 'HAS OVERLAY' ELSE 'NO OVERLAY' END as overlay_status FROM screens WHERE screenType IN ('SNAP_AND_PURR', 'SNAP_PURR_QR', 'HAPPY_TAILS', 'HAPPY_TAILS_QR', 'GUEST_STATUS_BOARD');
